what_was_built: reports/portfolio_capital_efficiency_allocation_baseline_spec_v1/allocation_baseline_spec.json (machine-readable P3 baseline spec: 6 baselines with method + inputs + constraints + validation_rules, shared symbols, global allocation_constraints; all computed_in_this_bundle=false)
tests/test_portfolio_capital_efficiency_allocation_baseline_spec.py (28 tests covering schema + safety + spec-only + C10 deferral + validator failure modes + P0/P1/P2 companions)
baselines_defined: capped_concentration (clip to L + redistribute excess, residual->cash; reference)
ranking_only_marginal_efficiency (rank by P2 MCE_i; RANKING ONLY; WATCH_only)
cash_unallocated_bucket (w_cash = 1 - sum_i w_i; full cash when none qualify; hard_constraint)

c10_deferral_record.c10_working_tree_state: untouched (pre-existing M on tools/c10_real_candle_detection_once.py and tests/test_c10_real_candle_detection_once_runner_purity.py left exactly as found)
c10_deferral_record.note: C10 is deferred + currently inadmissible, so under zero_for_inadmissible it would receive weight 0. It becomes an ordinary admissible strategy only once it has its own FROZEN, committed replay artifact (P1 rules).

distinction_phrases_required_in_md: No real allocation is computed in this bundle.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
An advisory allocation is not an execution instruction.
Candidate #10 remains deferred and is not connected by this spec.

registry_integration.note: Shared tools/strategy_candidate_registry.py intentionally NOT modified (additive-only / surgical).

recommended_next_bundle: Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Overlap/Correlation Method v1 (P4) -- supplies rho_ij used by equal_risk refinements + the marginal-efficiency ranking; spec only
Portfolio Capital-Efficiency Advisory Memo Schema v1 (P5) -- finalises the advisory report schema hosting these baselines; spec only
A separately-authorized COMPUTE bundle that actually runs the baselines over frozen admissible inputs
no_profit_claim: This spec does not imply edge and does not allocate or deploy capital.
A defined allocation baseline does not imply profit.
A capital-efficiency score does not imply future returns.
No allocation is authorized by this spec alone.
